title: Ariadne F4b Pilot Cleared-Copy Seed Baseline v1
description: The pinned symbol-table/block-def baseline for fixtures/pilot_cleared_seed.dwg [F4b, RT-FOLD R2-A6]. Written once by tools/mint_pilot_seed.py alongside the fixture + its .sha256 sidecar. All pilot gates (M-B/M-C/M-D) compare Rung-A/Rung-C against this document instead of re-deriving an ad-hoc clear baseline. pre_clear/post_clear are ariadne.dwg_graph_ir.v1-derived count summaries (see tools/mint_pilot_seed.py:extract_baseline_counts); verification is the pass/fail record of tools/mint_pilot_seed.py:verify_cleared over them.

fixture.description: Repo-relative path of the minted fixture, e.g. fixtures/pilot_cleared_seed.dwg.

minted_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the mint run.

clear_scope.description: F4b clears modelspace entities only; symbol tables + block definitions + other database-level state are retained.

source.description: The drawing the fixture was minted from (read-only original; never committed alongside the fixture).

fixture_sha256.description: SHA-256 of fixtures/pilot_cleared_seed.dwg's bytes (also recorded in the .sha256 sidecar).

pre_clear.description: Counts measured on the staged source copy BEFORE the clear.

post_clear.description: Counts measured on the written fixture AFTER the clear. modelspace_entity_count and block_references must be 0; every other field must equal pre_clear's.

modelspace_entity_count.description: len(ir.entities); 375 pre-clear for the pinned test.dws source, 0 post-clear.

block_definitions.description: len(ir.block_definitions); pinned at 140, retained across the clear.

block_references.description: len(ir.block_references) (INSERT placements); a modelspace-entity count, cleared to 0.

symbol_tables.description: Per-table record counts from ir.symbol_tables; all retained across the clear.
